verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Angel of God came to Bro Branham To reveal his strange and misunderstood life, He saw himself in the Word, He was Malachi 4:5, A man with the spirit of Moses and Elijah Revealing the Son of Man, He was Eliezer, he was the chief reaper, Sent to call a Bride.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Step into the picture, See your name in the book, Look into the mirror, Our Word reflection we can see, Step into the picture, See your name in the book, Look into the mirror, We are the substance of the shadows, In the days after the Prophet has gone,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through a vindicated ministry We can see all those beautiful, bride types, are truly you and me We've stepped out of the pages of the book Those pictures have come to life Our whole reflection we can see Mama that is me!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Ohh ohh ohh, I see Sarah receiving her body change (Mama that is me), I see Rebekah journeying to meet her unseen bridegroom, (Mama that is me) I see Rahab safe and secure under the token (Mama that is me), I see Deborah the eagle under the palm tree (Mama that is me).

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Ohh ohh ohh I see Ruth becoming joint heirs at harvest time (Mama that is me), I see Esther from a bondmaid to a queen (Mama that is me), I see Mary bringing forth the life of Christ (Mama that is me), Can you see your picture in the family album? Say… Mama that is me!
